claims.claim: Administratum bundle gate contract, matrix, checker, packager, schemas, and fixtures exist under ORGANS/ADMINISTRATUM/BUNDLE_GATE.
Complete fixture passes and produces task_report_bundle.zip.
Missing fixture blocks and writes missing-items request.
The packager refuses to create a final bundle after BUNDLE_COMPOSITION_BLOCK.
Preferred real recent report folder was checked; it blocked only on new Administratum-specific v0.1 artifacts.
Final report bundle SHA256 is recorded adjacent in sha256sums.txt due self-reference limits.
